title: meta-ralph PRD
description: Schema for prd.json files produced by the meta-ralph SKILL. See docs/meta-ralph-spec.md §6 for field semantics and the §7 Driver-Agent contract for how status transitions are validated.

project.description: Project name; usually inferred from package.json name or cwd basename.

branchName.description: Git branch ralph operates on. Suggested form: 'ralph/<feature-slug>'.

description.description: One-paragraph description of what this PRD aims to build.

userStories.description: Ordered list of stories the agent works through. Lower priority value = higher priority.

runner.description: Optional all-or-nothing agent CLI invocation override. When present, drivers use runner.command + runner.args verbatim instead of the scaffold-time baked default. When absent, drivers fall back to the baked default. Use the literal string '{PROMPT}' inside `args` as a sentinel that the driver replaces with the contents of .ralph/prompt.md; if no sentinel is present, the prompt is appended at the end as a positional arg. Driver CLI flags (e.g. --model) are still appended after runner.args, so they take precedence for agents that honor last-flag-wins.

command.description: Agent CLI binary to spawn. Open-ended string — common values: 'claude', 'codex', 'gemini', 'copilot', 'aider', 'cursor-agent'. Security note: this controls process execution; treat prd.json edits in PRs as code review.

args.description: Full argument list passed to <command>. Use '{PROMPT}' as a sentinel marking where the agent receives the prompt content (read from .ralph/prompt.md at runtime). Example: ['-p', '{PROMPT}', '--model', 'opus', '--dangerously-skip-permissions'].

id.description: Stable identifier; convention is US-001, US-002, ...

priority.description: Lower = higher priority. Agent picks lowest priority story whose status is todo or in_progress.

status.description: Lifecycle: todo -> in_progress -> passed (terminal) | blocked (needs user). The Driver-Agent contract (spec §7) requires at most one in_progress at a time.

notes.description: Free-form notes the agent appends per-story (gotchas, blocker reasons). Optional, defaults to ''.
